note: Crop is an API-only storage module (no editing UI), so all cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe the crop content entity API, the crop_type config entity, the crop_crop image effect, CropEntityProvider plugins, and media/settings integration — facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site using the Crop API module, in PHP I have an image file URI and a crop type machine name. How do I look up the crop entity that already exists for that image, without loading all crops? Name the method(s).
evals.expected_output: Use the static helpers on Drupal\crop\Entity\Crop: Crop::findCrop($uri, $type) returns the CropInterface (or NULL), Crop::cropExists($uri, $type) returns a bool, and Crop::getCropFromImageStyleId($uri, $sid) resolves it via an image style's crop_crop effect.

evals.prompt: In code on a Drupal 11 site with the Crop module, I want to create a crop for a file and store its center coordinates and dimensions, then persist it. Which crop entity methods set the position and size and save it? Show the calls.
evals.expected_output: Crop::create([...]) then chain ->setPosition($x, $y) (center coords) ->setSize($width, $height) ->save(). Position is the crop center; anchor()/top-left is derived from it.

evals.prompt: I created a crop type in the Crop module but my image derivatives are not cropped. How does a crop type actually get applied to generate a cropped derivative on a Drupal 11 site?
evals.expected_output: A crop type does nothing until referenced by a Crop image effect (crop_crop) inside an image style. The crop_crop effect (config image.effect.crop_crop, stores crop_type) loads the matching crop entity for the file URI at render time and applies the stored coordinates.

evals.prompt: In the Crop module for Drupal 11, what kind of entity is a crop type, and which properties define its aspect ratio and minimum-size constraints? Where are crop types managed?
evals.expected_output: A crop type is a configuration entity (crop.type.*) — a reusable preset with aspect_ratio (a W:H string like 16:9), plus soft_limit_width/height (recommended min, UI warns) and hard_limit_width/height (enforced). Managed at /admin/config/media/crop (route crop.overview_types) under the 'administer crop types' permission.

evals.prompt: I have a custom entity type with an image field and I want Crop API to support cropping it on Drupal 11. What plugin do I create, which interface/method must it implement, and where does the plugin live?
evals.expected_output: Create a CropEntityProvider plugin in Plugin/Crop/EntityProvider, annotated @CropEntityProvider with entity_type = your entity type id, extending Drupal\crop\EntityProviderBase (interface EntityProviderInterface) and implementing uri(EntityInterface $entity) to return the image file URI. Core ships file and media providers; rebuild caches after adding.

evals.prompt: My Drupal 11 site stores files on Amazon S3 and generates image derivatives out-of-band. I want to stop the Crop module from flushing derivatives whenever a crop changes so it does not serve 404s. What setting do I change?
evals.expected_output: Set the crop.settings:flush_derivative_images config to FALSE (default TRUE), e.g. in settings.php: $config['crop.settings']['flush_derivative_images'] = FALSE; so crops changing does not flush/regenerate derivatives on decoupled/cloud storage.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want to make Media entities croppable with the Crop module and choose which image field is the croppable one. Where is that configured and how is it stored?
evals.expected_output: On the media type edit form the module adds a 'Crop configuration' fieldset to pick which image/file field is croppable; the choice is stored as the media type third-party setting crop:image_field. Media cropping is handled by the built-in media CropEntityProvider (crop_media_entity submodule).

evals.prompt: In the Crop module on Drupal 11, which hook lets me alter the discovered crop entity provider plugin definitions (e.g. relabel the media provider)?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_crop_entity_provider_info_alter(array &$providers) — the $providers array is keyed by machine name (e.g. $providers['media']['label'] = ...). Documented in crop.api.php.
